Package io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.util

Class TestDataGenerator

java.lang.Object
io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.test.util.TestDataGenerator
@Component public class TestDataGenerator extends Object
测试数据生成器 负责生成各种测试场景所需的模拟数据
